case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. BERLINDA FIGUEROA

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Off Calendar

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Continued To Jun-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Continued To Jun-01-16 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: JPT Rachel Ehrlich; Clerk: K. Liu; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present.
Attorney Margaret Demantteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Berlinda Figueroa is not present.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The settlement conference is continued; no appearance by defendant Ms. Katayama informs the Court the Defendant still in hospital. Parties agree to continue the mandatory settlement conference to June 1, 2016, and the Trial continue to June 2, 2016. Parties waive notice. (D501)

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-06-2016 Continued To May-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2016 Continued To May-18-16 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Charlene Kiesselbach; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderlion Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Camlo Looper.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Berlinda Figueroa IS NOT PRESENT.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The settlement conference is Continued; no appearance by defendant. Ms. Katayama informs the Court that the Defendant is in hospital. Parties agree to a Settlement Protective Date to continue the Mandatory Settlement Confernece and the Trial date. Parties waive notice. (501)
